Name: Automotive Tools (Basic Kit)
Description: Basic tools needed for simple automobile repairs.

Name: Automotive Tools (Advanced Garage)
Description: A fully stocked garage with heavy equipment for involved vehicle modifications or repairs.

Name: Cache
Description: A hidden and defensible place for items, adding its bonus to concealment rolls.

Name: Communications Headset
Description: Keeps characters in constant contact, boosting coordinated teamwork efforts.

Name: Crime Scene Kit
Description: A toolbox full of investigative aids such as magnifiers, testing chemicals, and fingerprinting dust.

Name: Code Kit
Description: Tools created for the purpose of making and interpreting a cypher for a specific audience.

Name: Cracking Software
Description: Specialized programs designed to bypass digital security.

Name: Digital Recorder
Description: Audio device used to record conversations and mask noises; quality varies by availability.

Name: Duct Tape
Description: Versatile tape used to reinforce barricades, repair broken items, or bind prisoners.

Name: First Aid Kit
Description: Contains necessary supplies to stabilize an injury; superior kits grant a dice bonus.

Name: Flashlight
Description: Cuts a path through the dark, reducing penalties, and can temporarily blind a subject.

Name: Glowstick
Description: Chemical mixture that creates unobtrusive light in a small area for several hours.

Name: GPS Tracker
Description: A plantable device enabling a user to track an unwitting subject's precise movements.

Name: Keylogging Software
Description: Software installed on a device to record and transmit the user's keystrokes.

Name: Luminol
Description: Chemical aerosol that reacts to trace metals in human blood, causing a faint neon glow.

Name: Multi-Tool
Description: A compact set of tools for sawing, stripping wires, or performing jury-rigged repairs.

Name: Personal Computer
Description: Ranges from decade-old desktop models to high-end machines processing gigabytes of data per second.

Name: Smartphones
Description: A pocket computer doubling as a camera, GPS, and communication hub.

Name: Special Effects
Description: Tricks and stage magic props used to project illusions and distract or fool witnesses.

Name: Surveillance Equipment
Description: Motion detectors, cameras, and monitors meant to survey and track entry into a location.

Name: Survival Gear
Description: Kits to survive harsh environments, including tents, canned food, and sterile water.

Name: Talcum Powder
Description: Powder used to reveal invisible entities or trace unauthorized entry through a portal.

Name: Ultraviolet Ink
Description: Invisible ink allowing for secretive information and path-marking in plain sight.

Name: Battering Ram
Description: A heavy tool used in a teamwork action to bring down doors and barricades.

Name: Bear Trap
Description: Large metal trap with serrated edges that snaps shut on a target's leg, causing severe damage.

Name: Caltrops
Description: Pointed pieces of metal strewn to make moving or driving through an area painful and inconvenient.

Name: Camouflage Clothing
Description: Apparel catered to an environment that allows its wearer to blend in with the surroundings.

Name: Climbing Gear
Description: Ropes, pulleys, hooks, and carabiners for scaling things safely.

Name: Crowbar
Description: Curved piece of steel used to pry open shipping pallets, jammed doors, or serve as a makeshift weapon.

Name: Firearm Suppressor
Description: Reduces muzzle flash and alters the sound of a gunshot, making it difficult to trace.

Name: Gas Mask
Description: Filtration device placed over the face to defend against noxious chemicals and airborne toxins.

Name: Handcuffs
Description: Steel cuffs applied during a grapple to securely restrain a person.

Name: Lockpicking Kit
Description: Picks, tools, and rods to manipulate tumblers and easily bypass analog locks.

Name: Mace (Pepper Spray)
Description: A chemical spray designed to blind and debilitate threats; stuns on first attack.

Name: Rope
Description: Classic tool for binding objects or people; resists breaking with a strength based on the knot.

Name: Stun Gun
Description: A device designed to deliver an overwhelming amount of electricity to shut down an assailant's muscles.

Name: Cash
Description: A wad or briefcase of money that can be expended as a bribe or to make quick untraceable purchases.

Name: Disguise
Description: Costumes and makeup that allow a character to blend into crowds and emulate minor social Merits.

Name: Fashion
Description: Trendy clothing meant to draw attention and allow a character to fit into high-class situations.
